⌨ Keyboard Shortcuts

Ctrl+NNew project (Admin)
Ctrl+FFocus search bar
EscClose drawer/modal
1Switch to List view
2Switch to Gantt view
3Switch to Tasks view
4Switch to Team view
?Show this dialog

🔗 Tracker URL Settings

Set your Netlify deployment URL. This is used in all outgoing emails so recipients can open the tracker directly.
Current:

📧 Invite Stakeholder

Send a personalised email with login credentials. Optionally filter access by department, project, or specific tabs.
📁 ACCESS SCOPE (optional)
Leave blank = all projects visible
✓ All projects visible
These fields personalise the invitation email — dept/project name is mentioned in the email body.
🔑 TAB PERMISSIONS FOR THIS STAKEHOLDER
Choose which tabs this stakeholder can see after logging in. Unchecked = hidden for them.

🖥 Add Asset to Stock

Add a new asset to the inventory stock. Each entry gets a unique ID.

📤 Assign Asset

OR FILL MANUALLY

+ Add Employee

Add to the employee register for asset assignment

🏢 Manage Departments

📁 Add document

Store a Google Drive link, URL, or credential. Files are NOT uploaded — only links are saved.

💰 Add cost saving entry

Record a vendor negotiation, migration, merge or optimisation that reduced costs

Help us improve the SmartDesk — your feedback goes directly to the Admin team.
